5.4.4: Lender must be notified if Japanese Knotweed is identified on or near the property
If Knotweed is >7m from boundary on neighboring land, the lender relies on the valuer's suitability advice
If Knotweed is within the boundary or within 7m of boundary but >7m from habitable space: requires treatment plan from PCA/INNSA member and a 10-year insurance-backed guarantee

If Knotweed is within 7m of habitable space or causing serious damage: requires a completed treatment plan and a completion certificate confirming remediation with a 10-year insurance-backed guarantee
All documentation must be submitted to the valuer for confirmation of security suitability
5.4.5: Personal searches accepted if the firm is CoPSO registered, has adequate indemnity insurance, and complies with the Search Code

5.7.1a: Flying freeholds accepted if there are mutual rights of support, protection, repair, maintenance, and entry

Requires a legal charge over both the leasehold title and the freehold reversion title owned by the borrower
